A parameter that generates a setpoint array from start, stop and num points
parameters.
dac = DummyInstrument('dac', gates=['ch1', 'ch2'])
dac.ch2.set(1)
my_delegate_param = DelegateParameter('my_delegated_parameter', dac.ch2, scale=1/1000, unit='mV')

classes.name: qdrive.measurement.HDF5_collector.h5_cache.h5_dynamic_cache

methods.name: qdrive.measurement.HDF5_collector.h5_cache.h5_dynamic_cache.__init__
documentation:
dynamic cache that can grow dynamically in time,

Args:
    ndim (int) : number of dimensions of the cache (not including the dimension of the result)
    result_shape (list) : shape of the result
    cache (np.ndarray) : can be provided if the cache needs to be loaded with values
    cursor (list) : indicating at what indices the next write will occur
    maxsize (int) : maximum size of the lowest dimension (used to measure correct shape of the ds)

methods.name: qdrive.measurement.HDF5_collector.h5_cache.h5_dynamic_cache.from_cache
documentation:
create a dynamic cache from an existing cache (only meant for setpoints)

Args:
    cache (dynamic_cache) : other cache
    index (int) : the index at which new writes should start
TODO this caching should remove itselves once parts are writen to the hdf5 file.

classes.name: qdrive.measurement.HDF5_collector.ds_cache.ds_cache
documentation:
Represents the cache of a single variable of a dataset (e.g. a setpoint or getter).
Multiple ds_caches can be linked to a single h5_writer, i.e. to avoid storing the same setpoints twice.
When a divergence between different setpoints occurs, new h5_writers are automatically constructed (i.e. BRANCH_DETECTED_EXCEPTION)
-- this only happens when SWMR is not enabled.
TODO :: find a better name for this class
TODO :: check if flat cache really needed?

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.dataset.dataset.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a dataset instance.

Args:
    ds_uuid (uuid.UUID | str): The UUID of the dataset.
    scope (uuid.UUID | str, optional): The scope UUID or name. Defaults to None.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.dataset.dataset.init_raw
documentation:
Initialize a dataset instance from raw local and remote datasets.
Used for internal purposes only.

Args:
    local_ds: The local dataset object.
    remote_ds: The remote dataset object.

Returns:
    dataset: An instance of the dataset class.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.dataset.dataset.create
documentation:
Create a new dataset.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the dataset.
    description (str, optional): Description of the dataset.
    scope_name (str, optional): The name of the scope.
    alt_uid: Alternative user ID.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no scope is provided and no default scope is set.
    ValueError: If the specified scope does not exist.

Returns:
    dataset: An instance of the newly created dataset.

functions.name: qdrive.dataset.search.search_datasets
documentation:
Perform a search for datasets based on the provided criteria.

Args:
    search_query (Optional[str]): The search query string to filter datasets.
    attributes (Optional[Dict[str, Union[str, int, float]]]): Additional attributes to filter datasets.
    ranking (int): The ranking score to filter datasets. Defaults to 0.
    start_date (Optional[datetime.datetime]): The start date to filter datasets.
    end_date (Optional[datetime.datetime]): The end date to filter datasets.
    scopes (Optional[List[Union[str, uuid.UUID, ScopeReadWithUsers]]]): A list of scopes to filter datasets. Each scope can be a name (str), UUID (uuid.UUID), or a ScopeReadWithUsers object.

Returns:
    SearchResult: An instance of the SearchResult class containing the search results.

functions.name: qdrive.dataset.search.format_attributes
documentation:
Format attributes for search.

Args:
    attributes (Dict[str, Union[str, int, float]): Dictionary of attributes.

Returns:
    Dict[str, List[str]]: Formatted attributes.

classes.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a SearchResult instance.

Args:
    search_query (Optional[str]): The search query string to filter datasets.
    attributes (Optional[Dict[str, Union[str, int, float]]]): Additional attributes to filter datasets.
    ranking (int): The ranking score to filter datasets. Defaults to 0.
    start_date (Optional[datetime.datetime]): The start date to filter datasets.
    end_date (Optional[datetime.datetime]): The end date to filter datasets.
    scopes (Optional[List[Union[str, uuid.UUID, ScopeReadWithUsers]]]): A list of scopes to filter datasets. Each scope can be a name (str), UUID (uuid.UUID), or a ScopeReadWithUsers object.

Raises:
    TypeError: If any of the provided scopes are of an invalid type.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult.first
documentation:
Get the first result.

Returns:
    dataset: The first dataset in the search results.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no results are found.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult.__iter__
documentation:
Return an iterator over the search results.

Returns:
    SearchResult: The iterator instance.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult.__next__
documentation:
Return the next dataset in the search results.

Returns:
    dataset: The next dataset in the search results.

Raises:
    StopIteration: If there are no more results.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult.__repr__
documentation:
Return a string representation of the SearchResult instance.

Returns:
    str: A string representation of the SearchResult instance.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult._get_new_results
documentation: Fetch the next page of results from local and remote sources.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult._merge_results
documentation:
Merge local and remote search results, removing duplicates.

Args:
    merge_all (bool): If True, merge all results. If False, merge up to the current limit.

methods.name: qdrive.dataset.search.SearchResult._resolve_scope_uuids
documentation:
Resolve scopes to their UUIDs.

Args:
    scopes (Optional[List[Union[str, uuid.UUID, ScopeReadWithUsers]]]): List of scopes.

Returns:
    List[ScopeReadWithUsers]: List of scope UUIDs.

Raises:
    TypeError: If a scope is of an invalid type.
    ValueError: If a scope name does not correspond to any existing scope.
This is class that holds the results of the search, but the search is paginated.

functions.name: qdrive.scopes.get_scopes
documentation:
Retrieve a list of scopes that the user has access to.

Returns:
    ScopeList: A list of scopes with a custom representation.

functions.name: qdrive.scopes.set_default_scope
documentation:
Set the default scope for the user.

Args:
    scope_name (str | uuid.UUID | ScopeReadWithUsers): The name, UUID, or Scope object to set as default.

Raises:
    TypeError: If the provided scope_name is of an invalid type.

functions.name: qdrive.scopes.get_default_scope
documentation:
Get the current default scope from user settings.

Returns:
    ScopeReadWithUsers: The default scope object.

classes.name: qdrive.scopes.ScopeList
documentation: A custom list to hold scope objects with a pretty-print representation.
